title: Senior Process Consultant (Banking Domain with BPM tools Experience is MUST )
description:
Avensys is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our service spectrum includes enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation and managed services. Given our decade of success, we have evolved to become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail and supply chain.

Role Summary

We are seeking a Senior Process Consultant with strong expertise in the banking domain to support large-scale transformation initiatives. The role focuses on process design, analysis, and optimization for complex enterprise environments. The ideal candidate will bring consulting or in-house experience, leverage BPM tools such as ARIS or Signavio, and actively facilitate stakeholder workshops to drive process improvements.

Core Requirements

  • Minimum 7+ years of experience in process analysis, process reengineering, or process consulting, preferably in the banking or financial services domain.
  • Strong hands-on experience with ARIS, Signavio, or other BPM tools.
  • Proven ability to run and facilitate workshops with senior stakeholders.
  • Experience working in large, complex global enterprises or consulting environments.
  • Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate business needs into structured process solutions

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead process analysis, process reengineering, and process design initiatives within banking and financial services environments.
  • Use BPM tools (ARIS, Signavio, or similar) to document, model, and optimize end-to-end business processes.
  • Facilitate process workshops and stakeholder discussions to gather requirements and validate process designs.
  • Work closely with business, operations, IT, and transformation teams to identify inefficiencies and improvement opportunities.
  • Develop as-is / to-be process models, gap analysis, and improvement roadmaps.
  • Support change initiatives by ensuring process alignment with regulatory, operational, and business requirements.
  • Prepare clear documentation, presentations, and recommendations for senior stakeholders.

WHAT’S ON OFFER

You will be remunerated with an excellent base salary and entitled to attractive company benefits. Additionally, you will get the opportunity to enjoy a fun and collaborative work environment, alongside a strong career progression.

To submit your application, please apply online or email your UPDATED CV to swathi@aven-sys.com

Your interest will be treated with strict confidentiality.

CONSULTANT DETAILS:

Consultant Name : Swathi

Avensys Consulting Pte Ltd

EA Licence 12C5759

Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly in accordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys' privacy policy

postedCompany.description: Avensys is among the leaders in providing technology enabled business solutions and services. Since inception, Avensys has helped clients use IT more efficiently to improve their operations and profitability, focus on core competencies and achieve business results such as increased agility, innovation and profitable growth. Our in-depth technical knowledge coupled with industry experience and our unique methodologies enable us to successfully deliver and meet our customer’s expectations.
